summary_en: All treasury shares held as of 2026-07-01 to be cancelled (383,712 shares; 1.64% of shares outstanding as of 2026-02-28). Cancellation required under stock-exchange agreement with Pan Pacific International Holdings (PPIH), whereby PPIH acquires 100% of Olympic Group's issued shares on 2026-07-01.
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: Olympic Group Corporation's board of directors resolved on 2026-05-28 to cancel all treasury shares held by the company. The cancellation is mandated by the stock-exchange agreement signed on 2026-04-06 with Pan Pacific International Holdings (PPIH). Under that agreement, PPIH will acquire 100% of Olympic Group's issued shares effective 2026-07-01. Olympic Group is required to cancel all its treasury shares as of that same date (the "reference time"), immediately before the share acquisition completes. As of 2026-02-28, Olympic Group held 383,712 treasury shares, representing 1.64% of total issued shares outstanding (23,354,223 shares). The cancellation will take effect on 2026-07-01.
